Charcoal volcanic wyrm hauling bulk from lava tube onto obsidian shelf, magma dripping from belly scales, wings spreading to cool, pyroclastic badlands glowing under ash-choked dusk sky.
Slate-grey tundra wyrm sprawled belly-up on permafrost hillock, hind legs sprawled ungainly, wings flopped wide soaking Arctic summer sun, scarred throat exposed in rare moment of unguarded basking.
Crimson wyvern mid-collision with cliff face catching mountain ram, talons crushing stone, wings flaring braking-hard, prey bleating final terror, rockslide cascading into canyon below at impact.
Bone-ridged serpent dragon threading through drowned forest, antler-crown breaking water surface, submerged pine trunks creating skeletal maze, reservoir depths darkening into flooded valley below.
Ancient sand-wyrm coiled sleeping in slot canyon shade, tail tip flicking away persistent flies, heat-torpid breathing barely visible, petroglyphs fading on walls above dormant predator.
Iron-scaled wyvern hanging bat-like from sea cave ceiling, wings folded membrane-tight, serpent neck drooping toward tide pools below, salt crystals crusting along spine ridges.
Scarred amber dragon limping through blowing snow, broken horn trailing blood, wing membrane torn flapping loose, seeking shelter in whiteout, mountain pass disappearing behind injury.
Emerald serpent swimming lazy circles in cenote depths, sunlight shafting through sinkhole opening, Mayan carvings lining limestone walls, tropical fish scattering before submerged coils.
Rust-bellied canyon wyvern wedged sleeping between narrow stone walls, body compressed vertically, only wingtips visible from above, sandstone chimney trapping day's heat into night.
Soot-black wyrm clawing up volcano's interior slope, lava flowing around climbing talons, wings tucked navigating obsidian maze, ascending toward crater rim glowing against night sky.
Silver-blue ice dragon sprawled across iceberg calving-face, claws dug into fracture lines, wings spread wide as frozen shelf cracks beneath weight, Arctic ocean churning below.
Tawny steppe wyvern shaking dust-bath from scales, standing in depression, wings beating clouds of dirt loose, grassland stretching endless, ritual cleaning at dry waterhole.
Primordial bog-wyrm dragging moose carcass through peat marsh, hind legs churning black water, antlers tangling in sedge, wings half-folded trailing through muck at twilight feeding.

Scarred jade serpent-dragon coiled around ancient bridge pier in misty gorge, moss-velvet scales wet from river spray, whisker-tendrils trailing through fog, stone arch crumbling under centuries of weight.
Bone-plated desert wyvern emerging from sandstorm wall, ochre scales scoured smooth by wind-driven grit, wings tucked tight against stinging blast, eyes slitted against abrading veil at noon.

Primordial deep-sea wyrm surfacing beside whaling ship wreck, bioluminescent scars mapping ancient battles, barnacle-mountains on skull, abyssal darkness clinging to rising form, storm-lashed waves parting.

Adolescent copper dragon sliding down snowfield on belly, wings outspread for balance, playful momentum carrying toward frozen lake, powder roostertail behind, learning flight through chaotic tumbling.

Obsidian canyon-wyrm wedged horizontal in natural stone bridge, belly-scales visible from below, sleeping suspended between cliff walls, swallows nesting in scale-gaps, afternoon light striping through.

Ancient iron-grey leviathan dying beached on black sand, tidal retreat stranding mountain-bulk, labored breathing creating dune-ripples, volcanic island smoking beyond, seabirds gathering for inevitable feast awaiting.
